# VIT Life - College Lifestyle & Management Portal

VIT Life is a centralized lifestyle and management portal designed specifically for students of VIT Bhopal. It integrates academic schedules, campus events, and career opportunities.

## Primary Sections
- [Dashboard](https://vitlife.vercel.app/): Access current updates, campus announcements, and check portal status.
- [Campus Life](https://vitlife.vercel.app/): Explore upcoming student club activities, cultural festivals, and technical events.
- [Opportunities Hub](https://vitlife.vercel.app/): Learn about upcoming tech internships, placements, and open-source programs.
- [Academic Timetable](https://vitlife.vercel.app/): Tool for managing daily schedules and syncing student timetables.

## Legal and Guidelines
- [Terms and Conditions](https://vitlife.vercel.app/terms): Terms of usage guidelines for college students.
- [Privacy Policy](https://vitlife.vercel.app/privacy): Student data privacy and protection statement.
